2022-23 Richmond Spiders Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 15-18 (7-11, 11th in A-10 MBB)

Coach: Chris Mooney (13-14), Peter Thomas (2-4)

PS/G: 68.9 (251st of 363)

PA/G: 67.8 (107th of 363)

SRS: 1.43 (141st of 363)

SOS: 0.34 (135th of 363)

ORtg: 102.2 (232nd of 363)

DRtg: 100.6 (141st of 363)

Preseason Odds: Championship +25000
